title: rubus × ampelopsis
intro: Rubus × ampelopsis, also known as the Pearl of China, is a hybrid plant resulting from the cross between the wild raspberry (Rubus spp.) and the Japanese grapevine (Vitis amurensis). The medicinal properties of Rubus × ampelopsis include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant and anti-cancer activities. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to improve cardiovascular health, reduce the risk of certain types of cancer, and alleviate symptoms of menopause. Rubus × ampelopsis can be prepared into various herbal forms, including teas, capsules, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
